psalm-96-1.verse:
Sing to the Lord a new song;
  Sing to the Lord, all the earth.
psalm-96-1.prayer: Lord, help me sing a new song to You. Let my heart worship You with fresh gratitude, joy, and devotion.

psalm-96-2.verse:
Sing to the Lord, bless His name;
  Proclaim good tidings of His salvation from day to day.
psalm-96-2.prayer: Father, teach me to bless Your name and proclaim Your salvation day by day.

psalm-96-3.verse:
Tell of His glory among the nations,
  His wonderful deeds among all the peoples.
psalm-96-3.prayer: Lord, help me declare Your glory among the nations and Your wonderful deeds among all people.

psalm-96-4.verse:
For great is the Lord and greatly to be praised;
  He is to be feared above all gods.
psalm-96-4.prayer: Father, You are great and greatly to be praised. Fill my heart with reverence and awe before You.

psalm-96-5.verse:
For all the gods of the peoples are idols,
  But the Lord made the heavens.
psalm-96-5.prayer: Lord, remind me that every false god is empty, but You alone made the heavens and reign over all creation.

psalm-96-6.verse:
Splendor and majesty are before Him,
  Strength and beauty are in His sanctuary.
psalm-96-6.prayer: Father, honor and majesty are before You. Strength and beauty are in Your sanctuary. Help me worship You with humility.

psalm-96-7.verse:
Ascribe to the Lord, O families of the peoples,
  Ascribe to the Lord glory and strength.
psalm-96-7.prayer: Lord, help all people give You the glory and strength that belong to Your name.

psalm-96-8.verse:
Ascribe to the Lord the glory of His name;
  Bring an offering and come into His courts.
psalm-96-8.prayer: Father, help me give You the glory due Your name and bring my life before You as an offering of worship.

psalm-96-9.verse:
Worship the Lord in holy attire;
  Tremble before Him, all the earth.
psalm-96-9.prayer: Lord, teach me to worship You in holy reverence. Let my heart tremble with awe before Your beauty and holiness.

psalm-96-10.prayer: Father, help me declare that You reign. Remind me that Your rule is firm, righteous, and trustworthy.

psalm-96-11.verse:
Let the heavens be glad, and let the earth rejoice;
  Let the sea roar, and all it contains;
psalm-96-11.prayer: Lord, let heaven rejoice and earth be glad. Help my life join creation in praising Your name.

psalm-96-12.verse:
Let the field exult, and all that is in it.
  Then all the trees of the forest will sing for joy
psalm-96-12.prayer: Father, let the fields and all that is in them rejoice. Open my eyes to see Your glory throughout creation.

psalm-96-13.verse:
Before the Lord, for He is coming,
  For He is coming to judge the earth.
  He will judge the world in righteousness
  And the peoples in His faithfulness.
psalm-96-13.prayer: Lord, You are coming to judge the earth with righteousness and truth. Help me live ready, faithful, and full of hope.

psalm-96-closing.prayer:
Lord, thank You for Your glory, holiness, strength, and salvation. Teach me to worship You with a fresh song, declare Your goodness each day, and honor Your name with my life. Help me reject every false thing, rejoice in Your reign, and live with hope in Your righteous truth. May my life continually proclaim that You are worthy of all praise.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
